channel.title: Text only display in Home menu
channel.description:
Hi, I'm newbie and need some advise.... I use mars-theme and I tried to create a text (like prolog) in website and I want to this text only show in home menu not the other. I have create prolog.js in Component folder, and export as Prolog.
``` <Prolog when={data.isHome} /> ``` Not working. If I click other menus, the prolog still there. Can anyone help me...?

item.title: Text only display in Home menu
item.dc:creator: hyudha
item.description:
Hi, I’m newbie and need some advise…
I use mars-theme and I tried to create a text (like prolog) in website and I want to this text only show in home menu not the other. I have create prolog.js in Component folder, and export as Prolog.

<Prolog when={data.isHome} />

Not working. If I click other menus, the prolog still there.
Can anyone help me…?

Read full topic
item.source: Text only display in Home menu
